verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ንግሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወበሎሙ ፡ በዓላቲሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘሰመይክሙ ፡ በቅዱስ ፡ አስማት ፡ ዝንቱ ፡
                  ውእቱ ፡ በዓላቲየ ።

translations.lxx: Speak to the children of Israel, and thou shalt say unto them, The feasts of the Lord which ye shall call holy assemblies, these are my feasts.
translations.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, Concerning the feasts of the LORD, which ye shall proclaim to be holy convocations, even these are my feasts.

verses.geez:
ሰዱሰ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ትገብር ፡ ግብረከ ፡ ወበሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ሰንበት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወዕረፍት ፡ ቅድስተ ፡ ተሰምየት ፡
                  ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ኢትግበሩ ፡ እስመ ፡ ሰንበቱ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ውእቱ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ በሐውርቲክሙ ።

translations.lxx: Six days shalt thou do works, but on the seventh day is the sabbath; a rest, a holy convocation to the Lord: thou shalt not do any work, it is a sabbath to the Lord in all your dwellings.
translations.kjv: Six days shall work be done: but the seventh day is the sabbath of rest, an holy convocation; ye shall do no work therein: it is the sabbath of the LORD in all your dwellings.

verses.geez: ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ በዓላቲሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘሰመይክሙ ፡ በቅዱስ ፡ አስማት ፡ በውስተ ፡ መክፈልትክሙ ።

translations.lxx: These are the feasts to the Lord, holy convocations, which ye shall call in their seasons.
translations.kjv: These are the feasts of the LORD, even holy convocations, which ye shall proclaim in their seasons.

verses.geez: በቀዳሚ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ አመ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ዐሡሩ ፡ ወረቡዑ ፡ ለሠርቅ ፡ በማእከለ ፡ ሌሊት ፡ ፋሲካሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: In the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month, between the evening times is the Lord's passover.
translations.kjv: In the fourteenth day of the first month at even is the LORD’s passover.

verses.geez:
ወአመ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ዐሡሩ ፡ ወኀሙሱ ፡ ለሠርቀ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ በዓለ ፡ ናእት ፡ ዘእግዚአብሔር ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ፡
                  ናእተ ፡ ብልዑ ።

translations.lxx: And on the fifteenth day of this month is the feast of unleavened bread to the Lord; seven days shall ye eat unleavened bread.
translations.kjv: And on the fifteenth day of the same month is the feast of unleavened bread unto the LORD: seven days ye must eat unleavened bread.

verses.geez: ወቀዳሚት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ቅድስተ ፡ ትሰመይ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ዘቅኔ ፡ ኢትግበሩ ።

translations.lxx: And the first day shall be a holy convocation to you: ye shall do no servile work.
translations.kjv: In the first day ye shall have an holy convocation: ye shall do no servile work therein.

verses.geez:
ወአብኡ ፡ መሣውዐ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ወበሳብዕት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ቅድስተ ፡ ትሰመይ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡
                  ግብረ ፡ ዘትትቀነዩ ፡ ኢትግበሩ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall offer whole-burnt-offerings to the Lord seven days; and the seventh day shall be a holy convocation to you: ye shall do no servile work.
translations.kjv: But ye shall offer an offering made by fire unto the LORD seven days: in the seventh day is an holy convocation: ye shall do no servile work therein.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ንግሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወበሎሙ ፡ አመ ፡ ቦእክሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ አነ ፡ እሁበክሙ ፡ ወዐፀድክሙ
                  ፡ ማእረራ ፡ ወታበውኡ ፡ ክልስስተ ፡ እምቀዳሜ ፡ ማእረርክሙ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ካህን ።

translations.lxx: Speak to the children of Israel, and thou shalt say to them, When ye shall enter into the land which I give you, and reap the harvest of it, then shall ye bring a sheaf, the first-fruits of your harvest, to the priest;
translations.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye be come into the land which I give unto you, and shall reap the harvest thereof, then ye shall bring a sheaf of the firstfruits of your harvest unto the priest:

verses.geez:
ወያበውኦ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ክልስስት ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ ይሰጠወክሙ ፡ ወበሳኒታ ፡ ለቀዳሚት ፡ ያበውኦ ፡ ካህን
                  ።

translations.lxx: and he shall lift up the sheaf before the Lord, to be accepted for you. On the morrow of the first day the priest shall lift it up.
translations.kjv: And he shall wave the sheaf before the LORD, to be accepted for you: on the morrow after the sabbath the priest shall wave it.

verses.geez:
ወትገብሩ ፡ በዕለት ፡ እንተ ፡ አምጻእክሙ ፡ ውእተ ፡ ክልስስተ ፡ በግዐ ፡ ንጹሐ ፡ ዘአሐቲ ፡ ዓመቱ ፡ ለመሥዋዕት ፡
                  ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall offer on the day on which ye bring the sheaf, a lamb without blemish of a year old for a whole-burnt-offering to the Lord.
translations.kjv: And ye shall offer that day when ye wave the sheaf an he lamb without blemish of the first year for a burnt offering unto the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወቍርባኑ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ዓሥራት ፡ ዘስንዳሌ ፡ ዘግቡር ፡ በቅብእ ፡ ቍርባኑ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ለመዐዛ ፡ ሠናይ ፡
                  ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወሞጻሕቱ ፡ ራብዕተ ፡ እዴሃ ፡ ለኢን ፡ ወይን ።

translations.lxx: And its meat-offering two tenth portions of fine flour mingled with oil: it is a sacrifice to the Lord, a smell of sweet savour to the Lord, and its drink-offering the fourth part of a hin of wine.
translations.kjv: And the meat offering thereof shall be two tenth deals of fine flour mingled with oil, an offering made by fire unto the LORD for a sweet savour: and the drink offering thereof shall be of wine, the fourth part of an hin.

verses.geez:
ወይእተ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ እንተ ፡ ባቲ ፡ ታበውኡ ፡ ቍርባኖ ፡ ለአምላክክሙ ፡ ኢትብልዑ ፡ ኅብስተ ፡ ኀዲሰ ፡ ወኢቅልወ ፡
                  ኢትብልዑ ፡ እስከ ፡ ታበውኡ ፡ ቍርባኖ ፡ ለአምላክክሙ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወሕገ ፡ ይኩንክሙ ፡ ዘለዓለም ፡ በመዋዕሊክሙ ፡
                  በኵሉ ፡ በሐውርቲክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall not eat bread, or the new parched corn, until this same day, until ye offer the sacrifices to your God: it is a perpetual statute throughout your generations in all your dwellings.
translations.kjv: And ye shall eat neither bread, nor parched corn, nor green ears, until the selfsame day that ye have brought an offering unto your God: it shall be a statute for ever throughout your generations in all your dwellings.

verses.geez:
ወትኌልቁ ፡ እምሳኒተ ፡ ሰንበት ፡ እምይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ እንተ ፡ ባቲ ፡ አባእክሙ ፡ ውእተ ፡ ክልስስተ ፡ ዘይሠርዑ ፡
                  ሰቡዐ ፡ ሰንበተ ፡ ትኌልቁ ፡ ፍጹመ ፤

translations.lxx: And ye shall number to yourselves from the day after the sabbath, from the day on which ye shall offer the sheaf of the heave-offering, seven full weeks:
translations.kjv: And ye shall count unto you from the morrow after the sabbath, from the day that ye brought the sheaf of the wave offering; seven sabbaths shall be complete:

verses.geez:
እስከ ፡ ሳኒታ ፡ ለደኃሪት ፡ ሰንበት ፡ ትኌልቁ ፡ ፶ዕለተ ፡ ወታበውኡ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ሐዲሰ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ዘእምውስተ ፡ ምድርክሙ ።

translations.lxx: until the morrow after the last week ye shall number fifty days, and shall bring a new meat-offering to the Lord.
translations.kjv: Even unto the morrow after the seventh sabbath shall ye number fifty days; and ye shall offer a new meat offering unto the LORD.

verses.geez:
ታበውኡ ፡ ኅብስተ ፡ ዘይሠርዑ ፡ ክልኤ ፡ ኅብስተ ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ ዓሥራተ ፡ ስንዳሌ ፡ ይኩን ፡ አሐቲ ፡ ኅብስቱ ፡
                  ወአብሒአክሙ ፡ ታበስልዎ ፡ እምቀዳሜ ፡ እክልክሙ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall bring from your dwelling loaves, as a heave-offering, two loaves: they shall be of two tenth portions of fine flour, they shall be baked with leaven of the first-fruits to the Lord.
translations.kjv: Ye shall bring out of your habitations two wave loaves of two tenth deals: they shall be of fine flour; they shall be baken with leaven; they are the firstfruits unto the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወታበውኡ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ኅብስት ፡ ሰብዐተ ፡ አባግዐ ፡ ዘዘዓመት ፡ ወአሐደ ፡ ላህመ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ መራዕይ ፡
                  ወሐራጊተ ፡ ክልኤተ ፡ ንጹሓነ ፡ ወይኩን ፡ ቍርባኖሙ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወመሥዋዕቶሙኒ ፡ ወሞጻሕቶሙኒ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ መዐዛ ፡
                  ሠናይ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall bring with the loaves seven unblemished lambs of a year old, and one calf of the herd, and two rams without blemish, and they shall be a whole-burnt-offering to the Lord: and their meat-offerings and their drink-offerings shall be a sacrifice, a smell of sweet savour to the Lord.
translations.kjv: And ye shall offer with the bread seven lambs without blemish of the first year, and one young bullock, and two rams: they shall be for a burnt offering unto the LORD, with their meat offering, and their drink offerings, even an offering made by fire, of sweet savour unto the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወግበሩ ፡ አሐደ ፡ ሐርጌ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጢአት ፡ ወ፪አባግዐ ፡ ዘዘዓመት ፡ ለመሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት
                  ፡ ምስለ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ኅብስት ፡ ዘቀዳሚ ፡ እክል ።

translations.lxx: And they shall sacrifice one kid of the goats for a sin-offering, and two lambs of a year old for a peace-offering, with the loaves of the first-fruits.
translations.kjv: Then ye shall sacrifice one kid of the goats for a sin offering, and two lambs of the first year for a sacrifice of peace offerings.

verses.geez:
ወያበውኦ ፡ ካህን ፡ ምስለ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ኅብስት ፡ ዘቀዳሚ ፡ እክል ፡ ወይሠርዖ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ምስለ ፡
                  እልክቱ ፡ ክልኤቱ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ቅዱስ ፡ ዘእግዚአብሔር ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወለካህን ፡ ለዘ ፡ አብአ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ይከውን ።

translations.lxx: And the priest shall place them with the loaves of the first-fruits an offering before the Lord with the two lambs, they shall be holy to the Lord; they shall belong to the priest that brings them.
translations.kjv: And the priest shall wave them with the bread of the firstfruits for a wave offering before the LORD, with the two lambs: they shall be holy to the LORD for the priest.

verses.geez:
ወስምይዋ ፡ ለዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ቅድስተ ፡ ትሰመይ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ዘትትቀነዩ ፡ ኢትግበሩ ፡ ባቲ ፡ ሕገ ፡
                  ዘለዓለም ፡ ይኩንክሙ ፡ በመዋዕሊክሙ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሀሎክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall call this day a convocation: it shall be holy to you; ye shall do no servile work on it: it is a perpetual ordinance throughout your generations in all your habitations.
translations.kjv: And ye shall proclaim on the selfsame day, that it may be an holy convocation unto you: ye shall do no servile work therein: it shall be a statute for ever in all your dwellings throughout your generations.

verses.geez:
ወአመ ፡ ተዐፅዱ ፡ ማእረረ ፡ ምድርክሙ ፡ ኢትጠናቀቁ ፡ ዐፂ[ደ] ፡ ዘተርፈ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገራህትክሙ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ተዐፅዱ ፡
                  ኢትእርዩ ፡ ለነዳይ ፡ ወለግዩር ፡ ኅድግዎ ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And when ye shall reap the harvest of your land, ye shall not fully reap the remainder of the harvest of your field when thou reapest, and thou shalt not gather that which falls from thy reaping; thou shalt leave it for the poor and the stranger: I am the Lord your God.
translations.kjv: And when ye reap the harvest of your land, thou shalt not make clean riddance of the corners of thy field when thou reapest, neither shalt thou gather any gleaning of thy harvest: thou shalt leave them unto the poor, and to the stranger: I am the LORD your God.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ንግሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወበሎሙ ፡ በሳብዕ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ አመ ፡ ርእሰ ፡ ሠርቀ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ ዕረፍተ ፡ ይኩንክሙ ፡
                  ተዝካረ ፡ ዘመጥቅዕ ፡ ቅድስት ፡ ስማ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Speak to the children of Israel, saying, In the seventh month, on the first day of the month, ye shall have a rest, a memorial of trumpets: it shall be to you a holy convocation.
translations.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying, In the seventh month, in the first day of the month, shall ye have a sabbath, a memorial of blowing of trumpets, an holy convocation.

verses.geez: ኵሎ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ዘትትቀነዩ ፡ ኢትግበሩ ፡ ወአብኡ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall do no servile work, and ye shall offer a whole-burnt-offering to the Lord.
translations.kjv: Ye shall do no servile work therein: but ye shall offer an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ወአመ ፡ ዐሡሩ ፡ ለሳብዕ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ አስተ[ስር]ዮ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወቅድስተ ፡ ትሰመይ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ወአኅምምዋ ፡
                  ለነፍስክሙ ፡ ወአብኡ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Also on the tenth day of this seventh month is a day of atonement: it shall be a holy convocation to you; and ye shall humble your souls, and offer a whole-burnt-offering to the Lord.
translations.kjv: Also on the tenth day of this seventh month there shall be a day of atonement: it shall be an holy convocation unto you; and ye shall afflict your souls, and offer an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

verses.geez:
ኵሎ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ዘትትቀነዩ ፡ ኢትግበሩ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ እስመ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ አስተ[ስር]ዮትክሙ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ እንተ ፡
                  ባቲ ፡ ያስተሰርዩ ፡ በእንቲአክሙ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall do no work on this self-same day: for this is a day of atonement for you, to make atonement for you before the Lord your God.
translations.kjv: And ye shall do no work in that same day: for it is a day of atonement, to make an atonement for you before the LORD your God.

verses.geez: ወኵሉ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ እንተ ፡ ኢታሐምም ፡ ርእሳ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ለትሠሮ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሕዝባ ።

translations.lxx: Every soul that shall not be humbled in that day, shall be cut off from among its people.
translations.kjv: For whatsoever soul it be that shall not be afflicted in that same day, he shall be cut off from among his people.

verses.geez: ወኵሉ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትገብር ፡ ግብረ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ለትደምሰስ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሕዝባ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ነፍስ ።

translations.lxx: And every soul which shall do work on that day, that soul shall be destroyed from among its people.
translations.kjv: And whatsoever soul it be that doeth any work in that same day, the same soul will I destroy from among his people.

verses.geez: ኵሎ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ኢትግበሩ ፡ ባቲ ፡ ሕገ ፡ ዘለዓለም ፡ ይኩንክሙ ፡ በመዋዕሊክሙ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሀለውክሙ ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall do no manner of work: it is a perpetual statute throughout your generations in all your habitations.
translations.kjv: Ye shall do no manner of work: it shall be a statute for ever throughout your generations in all your dwellings.

verses.geez:
ሰንበተ ፡ ሰንበት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ አሕምምዋ ፡ ለነፍስክሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ተሱዑ ፡ ለወርኅ ፡ እምሰርክ ፡ እስከ ፡ ሰርከ
                  ፡ ዐሡሩ ፡ ለወርኅ ፡ አሰንበ[ቱ] ፡ ሰናብቲክሙ ።

translations.lxx: It shall be a holy sabbath to you; and ye shall humble your souls, from the ninth day of the month: from evening to evening ye shall keep your sabbaths.
translations.kjv: It shall be unto you a sabbath of rest, and ye shall afflict your souls: in the ninth day of the month at even, from even unto even, shall ye celebrate your sabbath.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ንግሮሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወበሎሙ ፡ አመ ፡ ዐሡሩ ፡ ወኀሙሱ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ በዓለ ፡ መጸለት ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡
                  ዕለተ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Speak to the children of Israel, saying, On the fifteenth day of this seventh month, there shall be a feast of tabernacles seven days to the Lord.
translations.kjv: Speak unto the children of Israel, saying, The fifteenth day of this seventh month shall be the feast of tabernacles for seven days unto the LORD.

verses.geez: ወዕለት ፡ ቀዳሚት ፡ ትሰመይ ፡ ቅድስተ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ዘትትቀነዩ ፡ ኢትግበሩ ።

translations.lxx: And on the first day shall be a holy convocation; ye shall do no servile work.
translations.kjv: On the first day shall be an holy convocation: ye shall do no servile work therein.

verses.geez:
ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ታበውኡ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወሳምንትኒ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ቅድስተ ፡ ትሰመይ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ወአብኡ ፡
                  መሥዋዕተ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ እስመ ፡ ዘፀአት ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ግብረ ፡ ዘትትቀነዩ ፡ ኢትግበሩ ።

translations.lxx: Seven days shall ye offer whole-burnt-offerings to the Lord, and the eighth-day shall be a holy convocation to you; and ye shall offer whole-burnt-offerings to the Lord: it is a time of release, ye shall do no servile work.
translations.kjv: Seven days ye shall offer an offering made by fire unto the LORD: on the eighth day shall be an holy convocation unto you; and ye shall offer an offering made by fire unto the LORD: it is a solemn assembly; and ye shall do no servile work therein.

verses.geez:
ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ በዓላቲሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘሰመይክምዎ ፡ በአስማት ፡ ቅዱስ ፡ በዘ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ያመጽኡ ፡ መባአ ፡
                  ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወቍርባነ ፡ ወመሥዋዕቶሙ ፡ ወሞጻኅተኒ ፡ ዘኵሉ ፡ አሚር ።

translations.lxx: These are the feasts to the Lord, which ye shall call holy convocations, to offer burnt-offerings to the Lord, whole-burnt-offerings and their meat-offerings, and their drink-offerings, that for each day on its day:
translations.kjv: These are the feasts of the LORD, which ye shall proclaim to be holy convocations, to offer an offering made by fire unto the LORD, a burnt offering, and a meat offering, a sacrifice, and drink offerings, every thing upon his day:

verses.geez:
ዘእንበለ ፡ ሰናብቲሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወዘእንበለ ፡ ዘመባእክሙ ፡ ወዘእንበለ ፡ ዘኵሉ ፡ ብፅዓቲክሙ ፡ ወዘእንበለ ፡
                  ዘፈቃድክሙ ፡ ዘታበውኡ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: besides the sabbaths of the Lord, and besides your gifts, and besides all your vows, and besides your free-will-offerings, which ye shall give to the Lord.
translations.kjv: Beside the sabbaths of the LORD, and beside your gifts, and beside all your vows, and beside all your freewill offerings, which ye give unto the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወአመ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ዐሡሩ ፡ ወኀሙሱ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ሳብዕ ፡ ወርኅ ፡ አመ ፡ ፈጸምክሙ ፡ አስተጋብኦ ፡ እክለ ፡ ምድርክሙ ፡
                  ትገብሩ ፡ በዓለ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ወዕለት ፡ ቀዳሚት ፡ ዕረፍት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወዕለትኒ ፡ ሳምንት ፡ ዕረፍት
                  ፡ ይእቲ ።

translations.lxx: And on the fifteenth day of this seventh month, when ye shall have completely gathered in the fruits of the earth, ye shall keep a feast to the Lord seven days; on the first day there shall be a rest, and on the eighth day a rest.
translations.kjv: Also in the fifteenth day of the seventh month, when ye have gathered in the fruit of the land, ye shall keep a feast unto the LORD seven days: on the first day shall be a sabbath, and on the eighth day shall be a sabbath.

verses.geez:
ወትነሥኡ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ አመ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ቀዳሚት ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ፍሬ ፡ ዕፅ ፡ ዘሠናይ ፡ ወጸበርተ ፡ ዘበቀልት ፡ [ወተመርት
                  ፡] ወእምዕፅ ፡ ቈጽለ ፡ አዕጹቁ ፡ ወዘኵሓኒ ፡ ወእምነ ፡ ፈለግኒ ፡ አዕፁቀ ፡ ዘንጹሕ ፡ ወትትፌሥሑ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ እግዚአብሔር
                  ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ በበ ፡ ዓመት ።

translations.lxx: And on the first day ye shall take goodly fruit of trees, and branches of palm trees, and thick boughs of trees, and willows, and branches of osiers from the brook, to rejoice before the Lord your God seven days in the year.
translations.kjv: And ye shall take you on the first day the boughs of goodly trees, branches of palm trees, and the boughs of thick trees, and willows of the brook; and ye shall rejoice before the LORD your God seven days.

verses.geez: ሕገ ፡ ዘለዓለም ፡ ይኩንክሙ ፡ በመዋዕሊክሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትግበሩ ፡ በዓለ ፡ በሳብዕ ፡ ወርኅ ።

translations.lxx: It is a perpetual statute for your generations: in the seventh month ye shall keep it.
translations.kjv: And ye shall keep it a feast unto the LORD seven days in the year. It shall be a statute for ever in your generations: ye shall celebrate it in the seventh month.

verses.geez:
ወትነብሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ መጸለት ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ ፍጥረቱ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ይንበር ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  መጸለት ፤

translations.lxx: Seven days ye shall dwell in tabernacles: every native in Israel shall dwell in tents,
translations.kjv: Ye shall dwell in booths seven days; all that are Israelites born shall dwell in booths:

verses.geez:
ከመ ፡ ይርአይ ፡ ትውልድክሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ በደባትር ፡ አንበርክዎሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ አመ ፡ አውፃእክዎሙ ፡ እምድረ ፡ ግብጽ
                  ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ።

translations.lxx: that your posterity may see, that I made the children of Israel to dwell in tents, when I brought them out of the land of Egypt: I am the Lord your God.
translations.kjv: That your generations may know that I made the children of Israel to dwell in booths, when I brought them out of the land of Egypt: I am the LORD your God.

verses.geez: ወነገሮሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በዓላቲሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ እግዚእ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses recounted the feasts of the Lord to the children of Israel.
translations.kjv: And Moses declared unto the children of Israel the feasts of the LORD.
